response.justification: Exceptional candidate currently working in an almost identical role (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq with full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure). Exceeds the 6+ year requirement by more than 2x with 15+ years of demonstrable full-stack experience across backend, frontend, and DevOps. Has explicit AI agent development experience matching job requirements. Primary gaps are the lack of explicit Nest.js mention (primary framework) and testing framework specifics, both readily learnable given the candidate's proven ability to master multiple frameworks and technologies.
strengths: Currently employed as Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq performing the exact work described (full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling)

Proven backend expertise handling extreme scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby) and full-stack capability across frontend (React), cloud (AWS CDK), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated commitment to code quality and testing culture (organized TDD dojos, created testing workshops) with 15+ years of experience
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned on resume despite being the primary backend framework in job description
Testing framework expertise (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not highlighted, though TDD practices and testing culture are evident
Broad generalist background across many languages (D, Swift, PHP, C++, C#, Java, Kotlin) may suggest less depth in specific frameworks than required
